title: Toolkit for educators: Activities for ages 7 and 8 - Canada.ca
content:
Canada's food guide kids

## Toolkit for educators: Activities for ages 7 and 8
These activities are intended for children aged 7 and 8 years old. They will help them:
- practice growing food
- explore the importance of water
- learn about different cultures and food traditions
These activities support children in experiencing and exploring foods which are part of Canada’s food guide.
Let’s have dinner together!
Water is the way to go
Additional learning activities
- Toolkit for educators
For recipes and more food guide resources visit: Canada.ca/FoodGuide
